core_mechanism: Exhaustive classification of the concrete representations of an abstract algebraic structure into equivalence classes under a group of admissible transformations, using invariant substructures (subobjects preserved by that equivalence group) as the separating invariants that guarantee inequivalence and completeness
brief_reason: The abstract builds a complete set of inequivalent realizations of Lie algebras up to equivalence by leveraging the notion of megaideal, an equivalence-invariant substructure used to distinguish and enumerate the classes.
